name: 🔁 Lane: Retry Loop
description: RETRY DEMONSTRATION — step-1 checks for a Dockerfile (missing). The supervisor triggers RETRY with corrective instructions. After retryBudget=2 attempts the budget is exhausted and the lane ESCALATEs. In real LLM mode the retryInstructions would guide the model past the issue.

checks.fail: ❌ [retry-ok] No Dockerfile — this triggers the RETRY loop

checks.prompt: Describe the containerisation setup that should exist: Dockerfile stages, exposed ports, and environment variables needed. Context from retry loop: {retryContext}
